mapper.select: select * from device where status in (0,1,2) and date_format(validityDate, '%Y-%m-%d') < date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d')
select * from device where proxyId=#{userId} and storeAddressId=#{storeAddressId} and status in (0,1,2)
select * from device where proxyId=#{userId} and storeAddressId=#{storeAddressId}
select count(*) from device where proxyId=#{userId} and storeId <> #{storeId}
select * from device where proxyId=#{userId} and storeAddressId=#{storeAddressId}
mapper.insert:
insert into device
deviceNo,
deviceName,
proxyId,
deviceImgUrl,
storeId,
storeAddressId,
proxyName,
phone,
devicePrice,
imei,
addressDetail,
addressId,
status,
inventory,
type,
validityDate,
onLineTime,
createTime,
fitCardId,
#{deviceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deviceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{proxyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{deviceImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeAddressId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{proxyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{devicePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{imei,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{addressDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{addressId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{inventory,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{onLineTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{fitCardId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
mapper.delete:
delete from device where deviceId in
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE device SET deviceNo=#{deviceNo}, deviceName= #{deviceName}, proxyId= #{proxyId}, deviceImgUrl= #{deviceImgUrl}, storeId= #{storeId}, proxyName= #{proxyName}, phone=#{phone}, devicePrice=#{devicePrice}, imei= #{imei}, addressDetail= #{addressDetail}, addressId= #{addressId}, status= #{status}, inventory= #{inventory}, onLineTime= #{onLineTime}, createTime= #{createTime} where deviceId=#{deviceId}

UPDATE device SET deviceNo= trim(#{deviceNo}), deviceName= #{deviceName}, deviceImgUrl= #{deviceImgUrl}, proxyName= #{proxyName}, phone=#{phone}, addressDetail= #{addressDetail}, status= #{status} where deviceId=#{deviceId}
mapper.select: select deviceName, deviceNo from device where proxyId = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: update user_info set wristId=trim(#{deviceNo}) where userId = #{userId}

update device set status = 2 where status = 1 and deviceId in
#{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update device set status = 1 where status = 2 and deviceId in
#{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update device set status = (CASE WHEN deviceNo IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 1 END) where deviceId in
#{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select count(*) from device where deviceNo=#{deviceNo} AND deviceId <> #{deviceId}
mapper.update: update device set deviceNo=null where deviceNo=#{deviceNo}
update user_info set wristId='0' where wristId=#{deviceNo}
update user_info set wristId='0', faceStatus=(case when faceStatus=1 then 1 else 2 end) where userId=#{userId}
UPDATE device SET validityDate=#{validityDate}, onLineTime=#{onLineTime} WHERE proxyId=#{proxyId} AND storeAddressId=#{storeAddressId}

update device
deviceNo = #{deviceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deviceName = #{deviceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
proxyId = #{proxyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
deviceImgUrl = #{deviceImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
storeAddressId = #{storeAddressId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
proxyName = #{proxyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
devicePrice = #{devicePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
imei = #{imei,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addressDetail = #{addressDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addressId = #{addressId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
inventory = #{inventory,jdbcType=INTEGER},
validityDate = #{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
onLineTime = #{onLineTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
fitCardId = #{fitCardId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
storeAddrIds = #{storeAddrIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where deviceId = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE device SET status = 4 where deviceId IN
#{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE user_info SET wristId = null WHERE userId IN
#{proxyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE device SET validityDate = #{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE deviceId = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE device SET validityDate = #{validityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = 1 WHERE deviceId = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE device SET autoPay = #{autoPay,jdbcType=INTEGER} WHERE deviceId = #{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select proxyId FROM device where deviceId in
#{deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN validityDate BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND LAST_DAY(CURDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS monthCount, SUM(CASE WHEN validityDate BETWEEN DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) and DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nextCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN validityDate < NOW() THEN proxyId END) AS expireCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN validityDate >= NOW() THEN proxyId END) AS validityCount FROM device
status = 1 and storeAddressId = #{storeAddressId} and find_in_set(#{storeAddrIds}, storeAddrIds)
